bead.title: agent: introduce ddx work stdout renderer
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The `ddx work` stdout sequence is assembled by several call sites instead of one renderer, so timestamp shape, bead scoping, route/model display, and phase wording cannot be enforced consistently.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:722-737 writes lifecycle/header lines directly with `fmt.Fprintf`.
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go:135-144 formats service progress rows without timestamp, phase, or scoped bead awareness.
- cli/internal/agent/agent_runner_service.go:185-195 writes route/progress entries directly to the same writer.

PROPOSED FIX
Introduce a reusable work stdout renderer for human `ddx work` output. It should own line timestamping (`HH:MM:SS`), current-bead scoping, phase labels, route/model formatting, and header/title formatting. Keep it small and local to agent/work stdout behavior so JSONL/event persistence remains untouched.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- cli/internal/agent/work_log_renderer.go
- cli/internal/agent/work_log_renderer_test.go
- cli/internal/agent/session_log_format.go only for narrow helper integration if needed

NON-SCOPE
- Do not rewrite all logging in the repository.
- Do not alter structured event timestamps or storage schemas.
- Do not change model routing decisions.

PARENT + DEPS
Parent: ddx-eeced112. Depends on the stdout spec bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. A new renderer/helper formats human work stdout lifecycle lines with `HH:MM:SS` timestamps and no subsecond precision.
2. `TestWorkLogRenderer_FormatLifecycleLine` covers a representative phase line such as readiness with timestamp, phase, message, and optional route/model fields.
3. `TestWorkLogRenderer_PreservesHeaderTitlePunctuation` proves a title like `spec: define full DDx temp cleanup in work cycle` remains punctuated as authored.
4. `TestWorkLogRenderer_SuppressesOnlyCurrentScopedBeadID` proves the current bead id is omitted from scoped follow-on lines while a different bead id is preserved.
5. Existing progress formatter tests still pass without changing Fizeau event schemas.
6. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'TestWorkLogRenderer'` passes.
7. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
